task_description: Create a comprehensive architecture documentation file (FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md) that maps the entire CRM system: every database table, every API route, every frontend page, every button/action, how they connect, and what is missing or broken.

verification.summary: Documentation-only task. FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md verified at 3798 lines with all 6 required sections present: DB Schema, API Routes, Frontend Pages, UI Actions Map, Data Flow Connections, and Gaps & Issues.
